description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the deborasetton/ruby-casperjs:latest Docker image. Include a before_script that runs ruby -v, which ruby, which phantomjs, which casperjs, which istanbul, installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, runs bundle check || bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --path=/cache/bundler, writes $GOOGLE_API_KEY to config/keys/server_key_1 and writes DUMMY-KEY to config/keys/smart_parking_api_key. Add a casperjs job (default test stage) that starts a Rails server in development mode on port 3011 as a daemon, checks the Puma process, prepares CasperJS specs with RAILS_ENV=development bundle exec rake spec:casperjs:prepare, then runs them with RAILS_ENV=development bundle exec rake spec:casperjs:run. Add a teaspoon job (default test stage) that runs RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec teaspoon. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
